allow: PowerShell($ROOT = "C:\\Users\\Chester\\OneDrive\\30-39 Career & Professional\\35 Work Projects\\Roster Monster\\Roster-Monster"; $fso = New-Object -ComObject Scripting.FileSystemObject; $shortPath = $fso.GetFolder\($ROOT\).ShortPath; Write-Output "Short path: $shortPath"; Write-Output "Backend venv activate exists: $\(Test-Path "$shortPath\\backend\\venv\\Scripts\\activate.bat"\)")

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop", "$env:USERPROFILE\\OneDrive\\Desktop", "$env:OneDrive\\Desktop"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "--- $p ---"; Get-ChildItem $p | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "start|roster|monster" } | Select-Object Name, FullName } })

PowerShell(Write-Output "OneDrive env: $env:OneDrive"; Write-Output "---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:OneDrive\\Desktop"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:OneDrive\\Desktop" | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Output "No OneDrive Desktop" }; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE" -Directory | Select-Object Name)
